title: Travis Boersma

Travis Boersma

Stub. Co-founder of Dutch Bros Coffee, headquartered in Grants Pass — the local-hero entrepreneur Yahir name-checked as a research/contact target on his March-22-2020 COVID watchlist note. Distinct from Travis the GP teen era confidant in Yahir's 2019 notes — the surname disambiguates.
